Triggering the epic foreign name disguise pulverization and the '2-employee high-altitude universal proxy' physical demotion probe. This enterprise, named 'Homer Jenny Electrical,' sports an extremely foreign-sounding multinational translated name, and its business license is an all-encompassing catalog challenging the limits of human industrial manufacturing: from high/low voltage complete equipment, drones, and robots, all the way to air conditioners, fire-fighting equipment, and even thermal insulation paint, ultimately encompassing all engineering projects like 'power, transmission and distribution, fire-fighting, and construction.' However, the forensic logic engine directly penetrates this highly exaggerated heavy-industry foreign guise and grasps its fatal flaw: the insured headcount is a pitiful 2 people! The paid-in capital is 2 million RMB. The most lethal blow comes from its spatial coordinates: 'Room 602, Building 6-B... Jiangning Development Zone.' The logical deduction instantly turns into a deadpan joke: in a 6th-floor office, the boss and one receptionist, holding 2 million RMB, claim to have built a 'super industrial mother machine' assembly line capable of simultaneously producing drones, high-voltage ring main units, air conditioners, and fire-fighting equipment? The truth is glaringly naked: this is a 100% pure 2-Employee Trading Shell & Engineering Broker, operating from a high-rise office building, disguised as a foreign entity but functioning as a universal electrical goods proxy. The owner adopted a foreign name and secured an intimidating license purely to appear as a large conglomerate during bidding or foreign trade. They produce absolutely nothing, only buying and selling online or securing engineering contracts to subcontract out. The official 'Major Electrical Manufacturing Factory' tag is the most thorough dimensional mockery of its true identity.
